case_title: COMMUNICATIONS WORKERS OF AMERICA- LOCAL 9410 VS ROMES, GARY L.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $668.88 FILED BY COMMUNICATIONS WORKERS OF AMERICA- LOCAL 9410 AS TO DEFENDANT ROMES, GARY L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROMES, GARY L.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-14-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-08-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $668.88. DEFT TO PAY $50 PER MONTH BEGINNING ON THE 1ST OF FEB. & ON EVERY 1ST OF EACH MONTH UNTIL PAID IN FULL. CASE CON'T TO 7/8/05 AT 10 AM FOR

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-08-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-06-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT $688.88. CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT UNTIL PAID IN FULL, AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-06-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-04-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-04-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-03-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED FOR SIX MONTHS FOR PROGRESS REPORT AND POSSIBLE DISMISSAL.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-03-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-04-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT AND POSSIBLE DISMISSAL.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROMES, GARY L. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES FOR PROGRESS REPORT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
